replies_today.reply: Álvarez posted the birthday message to Messi on Instagram June 24 for his 39th birthday. This was part of a national team tribute. The quote is accurate.
Karen Gillan confirms this story. Attended the 2026 World Cup in Miami. Found herself on a shuttle with jubilant Brazilian fans after Scotland's loss.
